conditions.summary_zh: 胸痛合併呼吸困難、冒冷汗、手臂或下顎放射痛時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize when chest pain occurs with dyspnea, diaphoresis, or arm/jaw radiation.
ask_next: 立即確認心電圖 ECG、血壓、血氧、疼痛開始時間與是否持續。 / Check ECG, blood pressure, oxygen saturation, onset time, and whether pain persists.
補問冒冷汗、噁心、下顎或手臂放射痛、既往冠心病與危險因子。 / Ask about diaphoresis, nausea, jaw/arm radiation, CAD history, and risk factors.

conditions.name_zh: 急性心包膜炎或心肌炎
conditions.summary_zh: 姿勢性或胸膜性胸痛合併呼吸困難、發燒、心悸或心跳過快時需納入心包膜炎/心肌炎。
conditions.summary_en: Include when positional or pleuritic chest pain occurs with dyspnea, fever, palpitations, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認胸痛是否受姿勢、深呼吸、咳嗽或平躺影響，並記錄起始時間與持續性。 / Ask whether pain changes with position, deep breathing, cough, or lying supine, and clarify onset and persistence.
確認發燒或病毒前驅症狀、呼吸困難、心悸、昏厥、血流不穩、ECG/心肌酵素與心包積液風險。 / Check fever or viral prodrome, dyspnea, palpitations, syncope, instability, ECG/troponin clues, and pericardial effusion risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發單側無力、言語或視覺改變、神經學缺損需立即處理。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden unilateral weakness, speech/vision changes, or focal deficit require urgent action.
ask_next: 確認最後正常時間、FAST/BE-FAST 徵象、抗凝血藥與血糖。 / Confirm last-known-well time, FAST/BE-FAST signs, anticoagulants, and glucose.
不要延誤急性中風流程；需要急診/中風團隊評估。 / Do not delay acute stroke pathway evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 感染表現合併意識改變、呼吸困難、低血壓或心搏過速時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Suspect when infection features occur with confusion, dyspnea, hypotension, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認感染來源、血壓、呼吸頻率、尿量、乳酸與器官灌流狀態。 / Check infection source, blood pressure, respiratory rate, urine output, lactate, and perfusion.
若不穩定，依急症流程處理，不等待完整鑑別列表。 / If unstable, follow emergency care pathways without waiting for a full list.

conditions.summary_zh: 持續發燒合併皮疹、眼紅、嘴唇/口腔變化、手足紅腫或頸部淋巴結腫時，需納入川崎氏症與心血管併發風險。
conditions.summary_en: Persistent fever with rash, red eyes, mouth or lip changes, hand/foot swelling or redness, or cervical lymphadenopathy should include Kawasaki disease and cardiovascular complication risk.
ask_next: 確認發燒天數、皮疹、非化膿性結膜充血、嘴唇或口腔變化、手足紅腫或脫皮、頸部淋巴結、年齡脈絡，以及心臟或休克警訊。 / Clarify fever duration, rash, nonpurulent conjunctival redness, lip or oral changes, hand or foot swelling/redness/peeling, cervical lymph nodes, age context, and cardiac or shock red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 近期癌症治療或免疫低下合併發燒時，需優先納入發熱性嗜中性球低下與感染風險。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize when fever occurs after recent cancer therapy or with immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認最近化療/放療/免疫治療時間、最高體溫、ANC 或最近 CBC、感染灶、血壓與意識狀態。 / Clarify recent chemotherapy, radiation, or immunotherapy timing, maximum temperature, ANC or recent CBC, infection source, blood pressure, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 癌症治療後出現嘔吐、意識改變、脫水或循環不穩時，需想到腫瘤溶解造成的代謝異常。
conditions.summary_en: Consider after cancer therapy when vomiting, mental status change, dehydration, or instability suggests metabolic derangement.
ask_next: 確認癌症類型與治療時間、腎功能、尿量、鉀磷鈣尿酸變化、心律或抽搐症狀。 / Clarify cancer type and treatment timing, renal function, urine output, potassium, phosphate, calcium, uric acid changes, rhythm, or seizure symptoms.

conditions.summary_zh: 已知癌症合併背痛、骨痛、神經缺損或膀胱腸道功能改變時，需優先排除脊髓壓迫。
conditions.summary_en: Known cancer with back or bone pain, neurologic deficit, or bladder/bowel dysfunction requires urgent exclusion.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、背痛位置與進展、步態、肌力、感覺、反射、鞍區感覺與膀胱腸道功能。 / Clarify cancer history, back pain location and tempo, gait, strength, sensation, reflexes, saddle sensation, and bladder or bowel function.

conditions.summary_zh: 已知癌症合併意識改變、嘔吐、多渴多尿、脫水或虛弱時，需納入高血鈣相關風險。
conditions.summary_en: Known cancer with confusion, vomiting, thirst/polyuria, dehydration, or weakness should prompt hypercalcemia consideration.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、補充品或藥物、口渴多尿、便秘、意識狀態、脫水與近期鈣/腎功能數值。 / Clarify cancer history, supplements or medications, thirst/polyuria, constipation, mental status, dehydration, and recent calcium or renal values.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、發燒、容易瘀青出血、骨痛或體重減輕組合時，需納入急性白血病與血球異常。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, fever, easy bruising or bleeding, bone pain, or weight loss should include acute leukemia in the differential.
ask_next: 確認瘀青出血、感染、骨痛、淋巴結或肝脾腫大、CBC 差異計數與周邊血抹片資訊。 / Clarify bruising or bleeding, infection, bone pain, lymph nodes or hepatosplenomegaly, CBC differential, and peripheral smear information.

conditions.summary_zh: 呼吸困難、胸膜性胸痛、咳血、單側腿腫或心搏過速時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with dyspnea, pleuritic pain, hemoptysis, unilateral leg swelling, or tachycardia.
ask_next: 確認 VTE 風險、近期手術/臥床、癌症、懷孕、血氧與是否休克。 / Check VTE risks, recent surgery/immobility, cancer, pregnancy, oxygenation, and shock.

conditions.summary_zh: 撕裂樣胸背痛、神經症狀、昏厥或血流不穩需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Tearing chest/back pain with neurologic symptoms, syncope, or instability is high risk.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否突然、撕裂或移動，雙側血壓/脈搏差、神經缺損與馬凡特徵。 / Clarify sudden tearing/migrating pain, pulse/BP differential, neurologic deficits, and connective tissue risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發肢體劇痛、蒼白、冰冷、感覺異常、無脈或無力時需優先排除急性肢體缺血。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden severe limb pain with pallor, coldness, sensory change, pulselessness, or weakness is a limb-threatening pattern.
ask_next: 確認 6 Ps：pain、pallor、pulselessness、paresthesia、paralysis、poikilothermia，並記錄症狀開始時間。 / Check the 6 Ps: pain, pallor, pulselessness, paresthesia, paralysis, and poikilothermia, and document onset time.
確認心房顫動、血管病史、抗凝血狀態、外傷/介入史、感覺或運動缺損與血流不穩。 / Ask about atrial fibrillation, vascular history, anticoagulation, trauma or procedure history, sensory or motor deficits, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性單一紅熱腫痛關節、活動受限、發燒或免疫低下時，需優先納入關節感染。
conditions.summary_en: An acute hot swollen painful joint with restricted movement, fever, or immunocompromise should prioritize septic arthritis.
ask_next: 確認是否為單一急性紅熱腫痛關節、主動與被動活動是否受限、是否發燒、免疫低下、人工關節、近期關節處置或全身敗血症表現。 / Clarify monoarticular hot swollen joint, active and passive range limitation, fever, immunocompromise, prosthetic joint, recent joint procedure, or systemic sepsis features.

conditions.summary_zh: 創傷後劇痛、被動伸展痛、筋膜腔緊繃或神經血管症狀時，需優先辨識肢體威脅模式。
conditions.summary_en: Severe post-trauma limb pain, pain with passive stretch, tense compartment, or neurovascular symptoms should prioritize acute compartment syndrome.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否與傷勢不成比例、被動伸展是否加劇、筋膜腔是否緊繃，以及感覺、運動、脈搏、皮膚溫度與受傷時間。 / Clarify pain out of proportion, pain with passive stretch, compartment tenseness, sensory or motor change, pulses, skin temperature, and time from injury.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、頸部僵硬、意識改變或免疫低下合併頭痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with fever, neck stiffness, altered mental status, or immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認皮疹、光畏、免疫狀態、抗生素前血培與是否需要急診處置。 / Ask about rash, photophobia, immune status, cultures before antibiotics, and emergency care needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 雷擊樣頭痛或數秒內達最痛程度時必須優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Thunderclap headache or maximal intensity within seconds is a must-not-miss pattern.
ask_next: 確認達峰時間、昏厥、頸部僵硬、抗凝血藥與神經缺損。 / Confirm time to peak, syncope, neck stiffness, anticoagulants, and neurologic deficits.

conditions.summary_zh: 右下腹痛、發燒、嘔吐或反彈痛時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Include with right lower quadrant pain, fever, vomiting, or peritoneal signs.
ask_next: 確認疼痛移轉、食慾、反彈痛、防禦、懷孕可能與是否需影像/外科評估。 / Ask about migration, appetite, rebound/guarding, pregnancy possibility, imaging, and surgical evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 可能懷孕者出現骨盆或腹痛、昏厥或血流不穩時不可漏掉。
conditions.summary_en: Must not miss in possible pregnancy with pelvic/abdominal pain, syncope, or instability.
ask_next: 確認妊娠狀態、末次月經、陰道出血、暈厥與血流動力。 / Confirm pregnancy status, LMP, vaginal bleeding, syncope, and hemodynamics.

conditions.summary_zh: 臉唇舌腫、皮疹、呼吸窘迫或血流不穩需立即處置。
conditions.summary_en: Facial/lip/tongue swelling, rash, respiratory distress, or instability needs immediate action.
ask_next: 確認暴露物、氣道腫脹、喘鳴、血壓與是否需立即急救。 / Identify exposure, airway swelling, wheeze, blood pressure, and emergency treatment need.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重喉嚨痛、吞嚥困難、流口水、發燒、喘鳴或呼吸窘迫時，需優先辨識上呼吸道威脅。
conditions.summary_en: Severe sore throat with dysphagia, drooling, fever, stridor, or respiratory distress should prioritize epiglottitis.
ask_next: 確認是否有吞嚥困難、流口水、喘鳴、坐姿前傾、發燒、聲音改變、呼吸窘迫、兒童或免疫低下，以及是否需要立即氣道風險評估。 / Clarify dysphagia, drooling, stridor, tripod or leaning posture, fever, voice change, respiratory distress, pediatric or immunocompromised context, and immediate airway-risk assessment need.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重單側喉嚨痛合併張口困難、含糊聲、懸雍垂偏移或扁桃腺周圍腫脹時，需納入扁桃腺周圍膿瘍。
conditions.summary_en: Severe unilateral sore throat with trismus, muffled voice, uvular deviation, or peritonsillar swelling should prioritize peritonsillar abscess.
ask_next: 確認是否單側喉嚨痛、吞嚥痛、張口困難、含糊聲、懸雍垂偏移、扁桃腺周圍膨隆、發燒，以及深頸部感染或氣道警訊。 / Clarify unilateral sore throat, odynophagia, trismus, muffled voice, uvular deviation, peritonsillar bulge, fever, and deep neck infection or airway red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 喉嚨痛、發燒、頸部僵硬或腫脹、吞嚥困難、喘鳴或呼吸窘迫時，需優先辨識深頸部感染。
conditions.summary_en: Sore throat with fever, neck stiffness or swelling, dysphagia, stridor, or respiratory distress should prioritize retropharyngeal abscess.
ask_next: 確認吞嚥困難、流口水、頸部活動受限或腫脹、喘鳴、發燒、兒童族群、近期咽喉感染或外傷，以及氣道或縱膈併發警訊。 / Clarify dysphagia, drooling, limited neck movement or swelling, stridor, fever, pediatric context, recent throat infection or trauma, and airway or mediastinal complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、咳嗽痰、呼吸困難或低氧表現時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with fever, cough/sputum, dyspnea, or hypoxemia features.
ask_next: 確認血氧、呼吸頻率、胸痛、痰性質、共病與是否需要影像。 / Check oxygenation, respiratory rate, chest pain, sputum, comorbidities, and imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 呼吸困難合併端坐呼吸、水腫或胸痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Dyspnea with orthopnea, edema, or chest pain may reflect heart failure exacerbation.
ask_next: 確認體重變化、端坐呼吸、下肢水腫、心臟病史、血氧與胸痛。 / Ask about weight change, orthopnea, edema, cardiac history, oxygenation, and chest pain.

conditions.name_zh: 氣喘或 COPD 急性惡化
conditions.summary_zh: 喘鳴、呼吸困難、咳嗽痰或呼吸窘迫時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Wheeze, dyspnea, cough/sputum, or respiratory distress should trigger this pathway.
ask_next: 確認既往氣喘/COPD、吸入藥反應、血氧、說話能力與沉默胸。 / Check asthma/COPD history, inhaler response, oxygenation, speech ability, and silent chest.

conditions.name_zh: 急性隅角閉鎖性青光眼
conditions.summary_zh: 眼痛、紅眼、頭痛、噁心或視覺改變時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Eye pain/redness with headache, nausea, or vision change can be an emergency.
ask_next: 確認視力、瞳孔、眼壓風險、噁心嘔吐與是否需眼科急診。 / Check vision, pupil, IOP risk, nausea/vomiting, and urgent ophthalmology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 黑便、吐血、血便、昏厥或血流不穩時需優先評估。
conditions.summary_en: Melena, hematemesis, hematochezia, syncope, or instability requires prompt assessment.
ask_next: 確認出血型態、量、抗凝血藥、血壓心跳、貧血症狀與肝病史。 / Clarify bleeding type/volume, anticoagulants, vitals, anemia symptoms, and liver disease.

conditions.summary_zh: 多渴多尿、嘔吐、腹痛、意識改變或呼吸異常時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Thirst/polyuria with vomiting, abdominal pain, altered mental status, or abnormal breathing is high risk.
ask_next: 確認血糖、酮體、脫水、感染誘因、胰島素中斷與意識狀態。 / Check glucose, ketones, dehydration, infection triggers, insulin omission, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 意識改變、昏厥、冒汗或低血糖風險者需立即確認血糖。
conditions.summary_en: Altered mental status, syncope, sweating, or hypoglycemia risk should trigger glucose check.
ask_next: 立即確認指尖血糖、糖尿病藥物、進食狀況與意識安全。 / Check point-of-care glucose, diabetes medications, intake, and mental status safety.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重高血糖、極度口渴多尿、脫水、虛弱或意識改變時，需與 DKA 分開辨識 HHS。
conditions.summary_en: Severe hyperglycemia with thirst/polyuria, dehydration, weakness, or altered consciousness should prioritize hyperosmolar hyperglycemic state.
ask_next: 確認嚴重高血糖資料、脫水程度、口渴多尿、意識改變、感染或生理壓力誘因、糖尿病類型、酮酸中毒線索與循環不穩定。 / Clarify severe glucose data, dehydration severity, thirst/polyuria, altered consciousness, infection or physiologic stress triggers, diabetes type, ketoacidosis clues, and circulatory instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 50歲後新發頭痛、下顎跛行或視覺症狀時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: New headache after age 50 with jaw claudication or visual symptoms is high risk.
ask_next: 確認年齡、顳部壓痛、下顎跛行、視覺症狀與近端肌痛。 / Confirm age, temporal tenderness, jaw claudication, visual symptoms, and proximal myalgia.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、腰側痛與排尿症狀支持上泌尿道感染。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, flank pain, and urinary symptoms support upper urinary tract infection.
ask_next: 確認發燒、腰側敲痛、排尿症狀、懷孕、敗血症徵象與嘔吐。 / Ask about fever, CVA tenderness, urinary symptoms, pregnancy, sepsis signs, and vomiting.

conditions.summary_zh: 右上腹痛、飯後疼痛、發燒或黃疸時需考慮膽道疾病。
conditions.summary_en: RUQ pain, postprandial pain, fever, or jaundice suggests biliary pathology.
ask_next: 確認黃疸、發燒、Murphy sign、飯後痛、肝膽胰檢驗與是否感染。 / Check jaundice, fever, Murphy sign, postprandial pain, hepatobiliary labs, and infection.

conditions.summary_zh: 咳嗽、發燒、疲倦但無不穩定或呼吸窘迫時列入常見原因。
conditions.summary_en: Common when cough, fever, and fatigue occur without instability or respiratory distress.
ask_next: 確認血氧、呼吸窘迫、免疫狀態、暴露史與需要檢測或隔離。 / Check oxygenation, distress, immune status, exposure, and testing/isolation needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 在排除急性心肺、神經、代謝風險後，可納入焦慮或恐慌。
conditions.summary_en: Consider only after acute cardiopulmonary, neurologic, and metabolic risks are addressed.
ask_next: 先確認沒有 ACS、肺栓塞、低血糖、甲狀腺或物質相關風險。 / First rule out ACS, PE, hypoglycemia, thyroid, or substance-related risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 單側下肢腫脹或疼痛時需考慮，並評估肺栓塞風險。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with unilateral leg swelling or pain, and assess pulmonary embolism risk.
ask_next: 確認 VTE 風險、近期手術、臥床、癌症、懷孕與肺栓塞症狀。 / Check VTE risks, recent surgery, immobility, cancer, pregnancy, and PE symptoms.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發胸痛或呼吸困難，尤其外傷或呼吸窘迫時需排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden chest pain or dyspnea, especially with trauma or distress, should prompt exclusion.
ask_next: 確認是否張力氣胸表現、外傷、血氧、呼吸音不對稱與血流不穩。 / Check tension features, trauma, oxygenation, asymmetric breath sounds, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重高血壓合併神經、胸痛、呼吸困難或腎功能風險時需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Severe hypertension with neurologic, chest, dyspnea, or kidney-risk features needs urgent evaluation.
ask_next: 確認血壓數值、終端器官損傷症狀、用藥中斷與妊娠相關風險。 / Confirm BP, end-organ symptoms, medication interruption, and pregnancy-related risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 上腹痛、嘔吐、膽道線索或酒精相關風險時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Consider with upper abdominal pain, vomiting, biliary clues, or alcohol-related risk.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否放射到背部、酒精、膽石、三酸甘油脂與脫水或休克。 / Ask about back radiation, alcohol, gallstones, triglycerides, dehydration, or shock.

conditions.summary_zh: 腹痛合併嘔吐、腹脹、停止排氣排便或手術史時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Abdominal pain with vomiting, distension, obstipation, or surgical history suggests obstruction.
ask_next: 確認腹脹、排氣排便、手術史、疝氣、發燒與腹膜刺激。 / Check distension, flatus/stool, surgery, hernia, fever, and peritoneal signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 反彈痛、防禦、劇烈腹痛或血流不穩時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Rebound, guarding, severe abdominal pain, or instability requires urgent action.
ask_next: 確認防禦、反彈痛、發燒、血流動力與是否需急診外科評估。 / Confirm guarding, rebound, fever, hemodynamics, and surgical emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發劇烈腹痛，尤其疼痛與理學檢查不成比例、合併嘔吐或血性腹瀉時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden severe abdominal pain, especially pain out of proportion to exam with vomiting or bloody diarrhea, is a must-not-miss pattern.
ask_next: 確認腹痛是否突發、劇烈、定位不明，並評估是否與觸診或理學檢查不成比例。 / Clarify whether abdominal pain is sudden, severe, poorly localized, and out of proportion to exam findings.

確認心房顫動、動脈粥樣硬化、近期心肌梗塞、低血流狀態、嘔吐、腹瀉、血便、腹膜炎徵象與血流不穩。 / Check atrial fibrillation, atherosclerotic disease, recent MI, low-flow states, vomiting, diarrhea, blood in stool, peritonitis signs, and instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 間歇性絞痛腹痛、嘔吐、嗜睡或果醬樣血便時，需優先納入腸套疊，尤其兒童但不限定兒童。
conditions.summary_en: Intermittent colicky abdominal pain with vomiting, lethargy, or currant-jelly stool should prioritize intussusception, especially in children but not only children.
ask_next: 確認是否有間歇哭鬧或絞痛、抱腿、嘔吐、嗜睡、腹部腫塊、血便或果醬樣便、年齡脈絡與腹膜炎或脫水警訊。 / Clarify intermittent crying or colicky pain, leg-drawing episodes, vomiting, lethargy, abdominal mass, bloody or currant-jelly stool, age context, and peritonitis or dehydration clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 腰側絞痛、血尿或噁心嘔吐時列入，但需排除感染阻塞。
conditions.summary_en: Flank colic, hematuria, or vomiting suggests stone; exclude infected obstruction.
ask_next: 確認發燒、單腎、懷孕、尿量、血尿與感染徵象。 / Check fever, solitary kidney, pregnancy, urine output, hematuria, and infection signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 排尿疼痛、頻尿或急尿但無發燒腰痛時可考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Dysuria, frequency, or urgency without fever/flank pain may fit lower UTI.
ask_next: 確認發燒、腰痛、懷孕、男性、免疫低下與反覆感染。 / Check fever, flank pain, pregnancy, male sex, immunocompromise, and recurrence.

conditions.summary_zh: 無法排尿、下腹脹痛或膀胱膨脹感時，需優先辨識急性尿滯留與阻塞風險。
conditions.summary_en: Inability to void with lower abdominal pain, distention, or bladder fullness should prioritize acute urinary retention.
ask_next: 確認最後排尿時間、下腹膨脹/疼痛、尿量、前列腺或神經病史、近期手術/麻醉、抗膽鹼或鴉片類藥物。 / Clarify last void, suprapubic distention or pain, urine output, prostate or neurologic history, recent surgery or anesthesia, and anticholinergic or opioid exposure.

conditions.summary_zh: 嘔吐、腹痛、發燒或群聚暴露時列入常見原因。
conditions.summary_en: Vomiting, abdominal pain, fever, or exposure clusters can suggest gastroenteritis.
ask_next: 確認脫水、血便、免疫低下、旅遊、食物暴露與腹膜刺激。 / Check dehydration, bloody stool, immunocompromise, travel, food exposure, and peritoneal signs.

conditions.summary_zh: 反覆頭痛合併噁心、畏光或類似既往型態時可考慮；需先排除紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Recurrent headache with nausea, photophobia, or prior pattern can fit migraine after red flags are excluded.
ask_next: 先確認雷擊樣頭痛、神經缺損、發燒、頸僵硬、外傷與50歲後新發。 / First check thunderclap, neurologic deficit, fever, neck stiffness, trauma, and new headache after 50.

conditions.summary_zh: 雙側壓迫感、非突發且無紅旗時可考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Bilateral pressure-like headache without sudden onset or red flags can fit this pattern.
ask_next: 確認沒有紅旗、藥物過度使用、視覺症狀或感染線索。 / Confirm no red flags, medication overuse, visual symptoms, or infection clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 癌症史、免疫低下、神經缺損或50歲後新發頭痛時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Cancer history, immunocompromise, neurologic deficit, or new headache after 50 raises concern.
ask_next: 確認癌症史、癲癇、晨間嘔吐、進行性惡化與神經缺損。 / Ask about cancer, seizure, morning vomiting, progression, and neurologic deficits.

conditions.name_en: Concussion or mild traumatic brain injury
conditions.summary_zh: 近期頭部外傷後頭痛、暈眩、嘔吐或意識改變需評估。
conditions.summary_en: Headache, dizziness, vomiting, or mental status change after head trauma needs assessment.
ask_next: 確認失去意識、抗凝血藥、反覆嘔吐、神經缺損與頭痛惡化。 / Check loss of consciousness, anticoagulants, repeated vomiting, deficits, and worsening headache.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、心搏過速、意識改變或嚴重全身症狀時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, tachycardia, altered mental status, or severe systemic illness can suggest thyroid storm.
ask_next: 確認甲亢病史、誘發感染、體溫、心律、腸胃症狀與意識。 / Check hyperthyroidism history, infection trigger, temperature, rhythm, GI symptoms, and mentation.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、體重變化、怕冷或心搏慢等慢性表現時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, weight change, cold intolerance, or bradycardic chronic presentations may fit.
ask_next: 確認症狀時間軸、藥物、甲狀腺病史與是否有低體溫或意識改變。 / Check timeline, medications, thyroid history, hypothermia, and mental status.

conditions.summary_zh: 血流不穩、嘔吐、腹痛、疲倦或類固醇中斷時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Instability, vomiting, abdominal pain, fatigue, or steroid interruption can suggest adrenal crisis.
ask_next: 確認類固醇使用、中斷、感染壓力、低血壓、低血糖與電解質。 / Check steroid use/cessation, infection stress, hypotension, hypoglycemia, and electrolytes.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、呼吸困難、昏厥或腸胃道出血線索時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, dyspnea, syncope, or GI bleeding clues can suggest anemia.
ask_next: 確認出血、月經、黑便、營養、慢性病、心肺症狀與 CBC。 / Ask about bleeding, menses, melena, nutrition, chronic disease, cardiopulmonary symptoms, and CBC.

conditions.summary_zh: 非預期體重減輕、疲倦、夜間症狀或局部持續症狀需安排評估。
conditions.summary_en: Unintentional weight loss, fatigue, night symptoms, or persistent focal symptoms need evaluation.
ask_next: 確認體重減輕幅度、夜汗、發燒、出血、局部症狀與篩檢史。 / Check amount of weight loss, night sweats, fever, bleeding, focal symptoms, and screening history.

conditions.summary_zh: 幻覺、妄想、思考或行為混亂、嚴重激動或新發精神病性症狀時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Hallucinations, delusions, disorganized thinking or behavior, severe agitation, or new psychotic symptoms should be included.
ask_next: 確認起始時間、幻覺/妄想內容、思考或行為混亂、激動程度、物質或藥物暴露、譫妄/神經/內分泌等醫療原因與自傷/傷人安全風險。 / Clarify onset, hallucination or delusion content, disorganized thought or behavior, agitation, substance or medication exposure, delirium, neurologic, endocrine or other medical causes, and self-harm or violence safety risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 睡眠需求降低、活動量或語速增加、衝動高風險行為或精神病性症狀時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Decreased need for sleep, increased activity or pressured speech, risky impulsive behavior, or psychotic symptoms should include mania or hypomania.
ask_next: 確認睡眠需求、精力/活動量、語速或思緒奔逸、誇大、衝動風險行為、精神病性症狀、物質/藥物誘發與立即安全風險。 / Clarify sleep need, energy or activity, pressured speech or racing thoughts, grandiosity, risky impulsive behavior, psychotic symptoms, substance or medication triggers, and immediate safety risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 限制飲食、體重恐懼、暴食或清除行為合併體重下降、昏厥、低血糖或嘔吐時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Restrictive eating, weight fear, bingeing, or purging with weight loss, syncope, hypoglycemia, or vomiting should be included.
ask_next: 確認限制飲食、暴食/清除行為、體重變化、昏厥/心悸、嘔吐或瀉藥/利尿劑使用、低血糖或電解質風險、自傷風險與是否有醫療不穩定。 / Clarify restriction, bingeing or purging, weight trajectory, syncope or palpitations, vomiting or laxative/diuretic use, hypoglycemia or electrolyte risk, self-harm risk, and medical instability.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、睡眠或食慾改變、情緒低落時可納入；需主動評估自傷風險。
conditions.summary_en: Low mood with fatigue, sleep, or appetite change can fit; screen for self-harm risk.
ask_next: 確認自殺意念、自傷計畫、精神病症狀、物質使用與支持系統。 / Check suicidal ideation, self-harm plan, psychosis, substances, and supports.

conditions.summary_zh: 任何自殺意念、計畫、近期自傷或安全疑慮都需立即安全評估。
conditions.summary_en: Any suicidal ideation, plan, recent self-harm, or safety concern requires immediate safety assessment.
ask_next: 直接詢問意念、計畫、手段、時間、保護因子與是否需要立即安全處置。 / Ask directly about ideation, plan, means, timing, protective factors, and immediate safety needs.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性意識或注意力波動需找感染、代謝、藥物或中樞病因。
conditions.summary_en: Acute fluctuating attention or consciousness requires evaluation for infection, metabolic, medication, or CNS causes.
ask_next: 確認基準認知、急性時間軸、感染、藥物、疼痛、尿滯留、低氧與血糖。 / Check baseline cognition, acute timeline, infection, medications, pain, retention, hypoxia, and glucose.

conditions.summary_zh: 意識改變、昏厥、心搏過速、嘔吐或自傷疑慮時需詢問暴露。
conditions.summary_en: Altered mental status, syncope, tachycardia, vomiting, or self-harm concern should prompt exposure history.
ask_next: 確認藥物清單、劑量、時間、意圖、共同攝入、心電圖與毒物中心。 / Check medication list, dose, timing, intent, co-ingestions, ECG, and poison control.

conditions.summary_zh: 燃燒或密閉空間暴露後出現意識改變、昏厥、嘔吐、胸痛或多人相似症狀時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Prioritize after combustion or enclosed-space exposure, especially with altered mental status, syncope, vomiting, chest pain, or multiple people with similar symptoms.
ask_next: 確認是否有瓦斯、暖爐、發電機、車庫、火災或密閉空間燃燒暴露，以及同住或同場域多人是否有相似症狀。 / Ask about gas, heaters, generators, garages, fire, or enclosed combustion exposure, and whether others in the same setting have similar symptoms.
確認頭痛、暈眩、虛弱、嘔吐、胸痛、呼吸困難、意識改變、昏厥與心血管/神經高風險表現。 / Check headache, dizziness, weakness, vomiting, chest pain, dyspnea, altered mental status, syncope, and cardiovascular or neurologic high-risk features.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、心搏過速、意識改變、冒汗或相關藥物暴露時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, tachycardia, altered mental status, diaphoresis, or serotonergic exposure suggests risk.
ask_next: 確認 SSRI/SNRI/MAOI、止痛藥、娛樂用藥、肌陣攣、反射亢進與體溫。 / Check serotonergic drugs, analgesics, recreational drugs, clonus, hyperreflexia, and temperature.

conditions.summary_zh: 高溫暴露合併意識改變、發燒或血流不穩需立即處理。
conditions.summary_en: Heat exposure with altered mental status, hyperthermia, or instability is an emergency.
ask_next: 確認環境暴露、核心體溫、意識、脫水、橫紋肌溶解與立即降溫。 / Check exposure, core temperature, mental status, dehydration, rhabdomyolysis, and cooling need.

conditions.summary_zh: 低溫暴露或低體溫合併意識改變、心律或血流問題時需急症處理。
conditions.summary_en: Cold exposure or hypothermia with mental status, rhythm, or hemodynamic issues is high risk.
ask_next: 確認核心體溫、暴露時間、心律、血糖、外傷與復溫安全。 / Check core temperature, exposure duration, rhythm, glucose, trauma, and rewarming safety.

conditions.summary_zh: 皮膚紅腫熱痛合併發燒或免疫低下時需評估感染嚴重度。
conditions.summary_en: Skin erythema, warmth, swelling, and pain with fever or immunocompromise needs severity assessment.
ask_next: 確認範圍擴大、疼痛程度、膿瘍、糖尿病、免疫低下與壞死感染紅旗。 / Check spread, pain severity, abscess, diabetes, immunocompromise, and necrotizing red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 眼瞼紅腫合併眼球轉動痛、眼球突出、視力改變、發燒或眼球活動受限時，需優先辨識眼眶感染。
conditions.summary_en: Eyelid swelling or redness with painful eye movement, proptosis, vision change, fever, or impaired eye movement should prioritize orbital cellulitis.
ask_next: 確認是否有眼球轉動痛、眼球突出、複視、視力下降、眼球活動受限、發燒、鼻竇症狀、兒童族群或顱內併發警訊。 / Clarify pain with eye movement, proptosis, diplopia, decreased visual acuity, impaired ocular motility, fever, sinus symptoms, pediatric context, or intracranial complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 劇痛、血流不穩、發燒或快速惡化皮膚感染需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Severe pain, instability, fever, or rapidly worsening skin infection must be excluded.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否超出外觀、快速擴大、水泡、皮膚壞死、休克與外科急症需求。 / Check pain out of proportion, rapid spread, bullae, necrosis, shock, and surgical emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 局部化膿、紅腫熱痛、壓痛或發燒時需與蜂窩性組織炎及深部感染區分。
conditions.summary_en: Purulence, localized warmth, swelling, tenderness, or fever should distinguish abscess from cellulitis or deeper infection.
ask_next: 確認是否有膿液或波動感、紅腫熱痛範圍、發燒、免疫低下、快速擴大、深部位置與是否需程序或影像評估。 / Clarify purulence or fluctuance, erythema/warmth/tenderness extent, fever, immunocompromise, rapid spread, deep location, and need for procedural or imaging evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 疼痛、刺痛或搔癢後出現單側皮節水泡疹，尤其眼部或免疫低下者需優先辨識。
conditions.summary_en: Pain, tingling, or itching followed by unilateral dermatomal vesicles should identify herpes zoster, especially with eye involvement or immunocompromise.
ask_next: 確認皮疹是否沿單側皮節、疼痛/刺痛先於皮疹、眼耳受侵犯、免疫低下、散播性皮疹與神經併發症線索。 / Clarify unilateral dermatomal distribution, pain or tingling before rash, eye or ear involvement, immunocompromise, disseminated rash, and neurologic complication clues.

conditions.name_zh: 史蒂文斯-強森症候群 / 毒性表皮壞死溶解症
conditions.summary_zh: 新用藥後發燒、皮疹快速擴大、黏膜病灶、皮膚水泡或脫落時需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, rapidly spreading rash, mucosal lesions, blistering, or sloughing after medication exposure must raise SJS/TEN concern.
ask_next: 確認近期新藥或高風險藥物、發燒、皮疹擴大速度、口眼生殖器黏膜病灶、皮膚水泡/脫落、疼痛、體表面積與血流動力。 / Clarify recent new or high-risk medications, fever, rash spread, oral/ocular/genital mucosal lesions, blistering or sloughing, pain, body surface area, and hemodynamics.

conditions.summary_zh: 黃疸合併意識改變、出血或毒物/藥物暴露需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Jaundice with altered mental status, bleeding, or toxic/medication exposure is high risk.
ask_next: 確認乙醯胺酚、病毒性肝炎、酒精、凝血、低血糖與腦病變。 / Check acetaminophen, viral hepatitis, alcohol, coagulation, hypoglycemia, and encephalopathy.

conditions.summary_zh: 尿量下降、脫水、感染、藥物或阻塞線索時需考慮。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced urine output, dehydration, infection, medications, or obstruction clues can suggest AKI.
ask_next: 確認尿量、腎毒性藥物、脫水、感染、阻塞、電解質與肌酸酐。 / Check urine output, nephrotoxins, dehydration, infection, obstruction, electrolytes, and creatinine.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、咳嗽、疲倦或呼吸症狀時列入，但需看低氧與高風險族群。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, cough, fatigue, or respiratory symptoms fit; assess oxygenation and high-risk status.
ask_next: 確認暴露、疫苗、高風險共病、血氧、呼吸窘迫與檢測時機。 / Check exposure, vaccination, high-risk comorbidities, oxygenation, distress, and testing timing.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性咳嗽、體重減輕、發燒或免疫低下時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic cough, weight loss, fever, or immunocompromise should prompt consideration.
ask_next: 確認咳嗽時間、夜汗、接觸史、旅居、免疫狀態與感染管制需求。 / Check cough duration, night sweats, contacts, travel/residence, immune status, and infection control.

conditions.summary_zh: 上腹痛、腸胃道出血、NSAID 或幽門螺旋桿菌風險時可納入。
conditions.summary_en: Epigastric pain, GI bleeding, NSAID exposure, or H. pylori risk can fit.
ask_next: 確認黑便、吐血、NSAID、抗凝血藥、體重減輕與穿孔紅旗。 / Check melena, hematemesis, NSAIDs, anticoagulants, weight loss, and perforation red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 胸口灼熱或飯後/躺下惡化可納入，但需先排除心肺紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Heartburn or postprandial/recumbent worsening can fit after cardiopulmonary red flags are excluded.
ask_next: 先確認 ACS 紅旗；再問吞嚥困難、體重減輕、出血、夜間症狀與藥物。 / First check ACS red flags; then ask dysphagia, weight loss, bleeding, nocturnal symptoms, and medications.

conditions.summary_zh: 懷孕或產後可能性合併持續頭痛、視覺改變、右上腹痛、意識改變或抽搐警訊時，需優先辨識子癲前症或子癲症。
conditions.summary_en: Possible pregnancy or postpartum context with persistent headache, vision change, right upper abdominal pain, altered mental status, or seizure concern should prioritize preeclampsia or eclampsia.
ask_next: 確認孕期或產後狀態、血壓資料是否可取得、持續頭痛、視覺改變、右上腹或上腹痛、臉手腫脹、意識改變、抽搐、胎兒/產科警訊與需要即時產科評估的情境。 / Clarify pregnancy or postpartum status, whether blood pressure data are available, persistent headache, visual symptoms, RUQ or epigastric pain, face or hand swelling, altered mental status, seizure concern, fetal or obstetric red flags, and need for immediate obstetric evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 骨盆或下腹痛合併發燒、陰道分泌物、不規則出血或子宮頸移動痛時需納入。
conditions.summary_en: Pelvic or lower abdominal pain with fever, discharge, irregular bleeding, or cervical motion tenderness should include PID.
ask_next: 確認下腹/骨盆痛、發燒、陰道分泌物或不規則出血、子宮頸移動痛/子宮或附件壓痛、懷孕可能與是否排除外科急症。 / Clarify lower abdominal or pelvic pain, fever, discharge or irregular bleeding, cervical motion, uterine or adnexal tenderness, pregnancy possibility, and whether surgical emergencies are excluded.

conditions.summary_zh: 骨盆痛合併發燒、劇痛、嘔吐、陰道分泌物或血流不穩時需優先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Pelvic pain with fever, severe pain, vomiting, discharge, or instability should prioritize tubo-ovarian abscess.
ask_next: 確認發燒高度、毒性外觀、單側或雙側骨盆痛、分泌物、嘔吐、腹膜刺激、妊娠狀態與是否需要急症婦科/影像評估。 / Clarify fever severity, toxic appearance, unilateral or bilateral pelvic pain, discharge, vomiting, peritoneal signs, pregnancy status, and need for urgent gynecologic or imaging evaluation.

conditions.summary_zh: 大量或急性陰道/子宮出血合併昏厥、血流不穩或貧血線索時需立即分層。
conditions.summary_en: Heavy or acute vaginal or uterine bleeding with syncope, instability, or anemia clues needs immediate risk stratification.
ask_next: 確認出血量與時間、生命徵象/昏厥、是否有妊娠檢測資訊、貧血或凝血病史、抗凝血藥、產後或停經狀態與婦科急症需求。 / Clarify bleeding volume and timing, vital signs or syncope, whether pregnancy testing information is available, anemia or bleeding disorder history, anticoagulants, postpartum or postmenopausal status, and gynecologic emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發單側骨盆痛、嘔吐或懷孕可能時需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden unilateral pelvic pain with vomiting or pregnancy possibility needs urgent evaluation.
ask_next: 確認疼痛突然性、單側位置、嘔吐、卵巢囊腫史、妊娠與婦科急症需求。 / Check sudden onset, unilateral location, vomiting, ovarian cyst history, pregnancy, and gynecologic emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發睪丸或下腹/腹股溝痛伴噁心嘔吐時需立即排除。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden testicular, lower abdominal, or groin pain with nausea/vomiting must be excluded.
ask_next: 確認陰囊疼痛、位置、反射、發作時間、嘔吐與立即泌尿科需求。 / Check scrotal pain, position, reflex, onset time, vomiting, and urgent urology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 耳痛合併發燒、聽力變化或上呼吸道症狀時，應納入急性中耳炎並評估年齡、嚴重度與併發症警訊。
conditions.summary_en: Ear pain with fever, hearing symptoms, or upper respiratory symptoms should include acute otitis media and severity assessment.
ask_next: 確認耳痛側別、發燒、聽力下降、耳漏、近期感冒、年齡、免疫狀態與乳突炎或顱內併發警訊。 / Clarify laterality, fever, hearing change, otorrhea, recent URI, age, immune status, and mastoid or intracranial complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 耳痛合併耳屏壓痛、耳分泌物或游泳/局部刺激脈絡時，應考慮急性外耳道炎。
conditions.summary_en: Ear pain with tragal tenderness, canal discharge, or local irritation should include acute otitis externa.
ask_next: 確認耳屏或牽拉耳廓是否疼痛、耳道腫脹或分泌物、糖尿病或免疫低下、發燒，以及惡性外耳道炎警訊。 / Check tragal or pinna tenderness, canal swelling or discharge, diabetes or immunocompromise, fever, and malignant external otitis red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 鼻塞流鼻水合併臉部或鼻竇疼痛壓迫感、發燒或病程惡化時，應納入急性鼻竇炎。
conditions.summary_en: Nasal congestion or rhinorrhea with facial/sinus pain, fever, or worsening course should include acute sinusitis.
ask_next: 確認症狀天數、是否先好轉後惡化、單側臉痛、膿性鼻涕、發燒、眼眶或神經併發警訊。 / Clarify duration, double-worsening, unilateral facial pain, purulent drainage, fever, and orbital or neurologic complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 喉嚨痛合併發燒、扁桃腺滲出物或前頸部淋巴結壓痛時，應考慮 A 群鏈球菌咽喉炎並與病毒性症狀區分。
conditions.summary_en: Sore throat with fever, tonsillar exudate, or tender anterior cervical nodes should include group A strep pharyngitis.
ask_next: 確認咳嗽是否缺席、發燒、前頸部淋巴結壓痛、扁桃腺滲出物、猩紅熱皮疹、年齡與是否需要檢測。 / Clarify cough absence, fever, tender anterior cervical nodes, tonsillar exudate, scarlatiniform rash, age, and testing need.

conditions.summary_zh: 喉嚨痛、發燒、疲倦合併後頸部淋巴結腫大時，應納入 EBV 相關傳染性單核球增多症。
conditions.summary_en: Sore throat, fever, fatigue, and posterior cervical adenopathy should include EBV-associated infectious mononucleosis.
ask_next: 確認疲倦程度、後頸淋巴結、肝脾腫大或左上腹痛、皮疹、暴露史，以及運動或脾臟破裂風險。 / Clarify fatigue, posterior nodes, hepatosplenomegaly or LUQ pain, rash, exposure, and activity or splenic rupture risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 鼻塞、流鼻水、打噴嚏、眼鼻搔癢或流淚，且與季節或暴露相關時，應考慮過敏性鼻炎。
conditions.summary_en: Congestion, rhinorrhea, sneezing, itching, or watery eyes with seasonal or exposure pattern should include allergic rhinitis.
ask_next: 確認季節性、塵蟎/花粉/動物暴露、眼鼻搔癢、喘鳴或氣喘脈絡，以及感染或鼻竇炎警訊。 / Clarify seasonality, dust/pollen/animal exposure, eye or nasal itching, wheeze/asthma context, and infection or sinusitis red flags.

conditions.name_zh: 良性陣發性姿勢性眩暈
conditions.summary_zh: 短暫、反覆、由頭位改變誘發的眩暈，且沒有中樞神經紅旗時，應納入 BPPV。
conditions.summary_en: Brief recurrent vertigo triggered by head position change without central neurologic red flags should include BPPV.
ask_next: 確認眩暈是否由翻身或抬頭誘發、每次持續時間、眼震、聽力症狀，以及複視、構音、肢體無力或步態失調等中樞紅旗。 / Clarify positional trigger, episode duration, nystagmus, hearing symptoms, and central red flags such as diplopia, dysarthria, weakness, or ataxia.

conditions.summary_zh: 持續性眩暈、噁心嘔吐或步態不穩，尤其有病毒前驅或聽力症狀時，應納入前庭神經炎/迷路炎並排除中樞病因。
conditions.summary_en: Continuous vertigo with nausea/vomiting, gait symptoms, viral prodrome, or hearing symptoms should include vestibular neuritis or labyrinthitis while excluding central causes.
ask_next: 確認是否持續眩暈、步態不穩、近期病毒症狀、聽力下降或耳鳴，並檢查新神經缺損或小腦/腦幹紅旗。 / Clarify continuous vertigo, gait instability, viral prodrome, hearing loss or tinnitus, and new neurologic or cerebellar/brainstem red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性紅腫熱痛關節，尤其第一蹠趾關節或典型反覆發作時，應納入急性痛風，同時不能忽略感染性關節炎。
conditions.summary_en: Acute painful swollen joint, especially first MTP involvement or recurrent typical attacks, should include gout while septic arthritis remains an exclusion priority.
ask_next: 確認受影響關節、發作速度、第一蹠趾關節、既往痛風、發燒或免疫低下，並排除感染性關節炎警訊。 / Clarify joint involved, speed of onset, first MTP involvement, prior gout, fever or immunocompromise, and septic arthritis red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 下背痛合併馬鞍區麻木、膀胱或腸道功能異常、進行性雙側下肢無力時，必須優先排除馬尾症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Low back pain with saddle anesthesia, bladder/bowel dysfunction, or progressive bilateral leg weakness must prioritize cauda equina syndrome.
ask_next: 立即確認尿滯留或失禁、肛門括約肌/會陰感覺、雙側坐骨神經痛或無力、發病時間、癌症/感染/外傷脈絡與急症影像評估需求。 / Immediately clarify urinary retention or incontinence, anal tone/perineal sensation, bilateral sciatica or weakness, onset time, cancer/infection/trauma context, and emergency imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 進食喝水不足、嘔吐、尿量減少、姿勢性頭暈或血流不穩時，應評估脫水或血容量不足。
conditions.summary_en: Poor intake, vomiting, decreased urine output, orthostatic symptoms, or instability should prompt dehydration or volume depletion assessment.
ask_next: 確認攝取量、嘔吐腹瀉、尿量、口渴或黏膜乾燥、體重變化、姿勢性症狀、生命徵象與兒童/高齡/腎臟風險。 / Clarify intake, vomiting/diarrhea, urine output, thirst or dry mucosa, weight change, orthostatic symptoms, vital signs, and pediatric/older adult/renal risk.

conditions.name_zh: 血管迷走或姿勢性昏厥
conditions.summary_zh: 昏厥合併站立誘發、脫水脈絡、前驅頭暈或噁心時，應納入血管迷走或姿勢性昏厥，同時排除心因性紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Syncope with standing trigger, volume depletion context, or prodromal lightheadedness should include vasovagal or orthostatic syncope while cardiac red flags are checked.
ask_next: 確認姿勢誘發、前驅症狀、持續時間、恢復情形、用藥與脫水脈絡，同時檢查胸痛、心悸、運動中昏厥、家族猝死或神經缺損。 / Clarify posture trigger, prodrome, duration, recovery, medications and dehydration context, while checking chest pain, palpitations, exertional syncope, family sudden death, or neurologic deficit.

conditions.name_zh: 下背痛或腰椎神經根病變
conditions.name_en: Low back pain or lumbar radiculopathy
conditions.summary_zh: 下背痛合併放射痛或神經症狀時，應納入腰椎神經根病變；若有馬鞍麻木、膀胱腸道異常或進行性無力則轉為急症紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Low back pain with radiating or neurologic symptoms should include lumbar radiculopathy; saddle anesthesia, bladder/bowel dysfunction, or progressive weakness are emergency red flags.
ask_next: 確認疼痛分布、腿部放射痛、麻木或無力、外傷/癌症/感染風險，並主動詢問馬鞍麻木、尿滯留或大小便失禁。 / Clarify pain distribution, leg radiation, numbness or weakness, trauma/cancer/infection risk, and actively ask about saddle anesthesia, urinary retention, or incontinence.

conditions.summary_zh: 眼睛癢紅、流淚，常合併過敏性鼻炎或暴露脈絡時，應考慮過敏性結膜炎；疼痛、畏光或視力下降需另查紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Itchy red watery eyes with allergic rhinitis or exposure pattern should include allergic conjunctivitis; pain, photophobia, or vision loss are red flags.
ask_next: 確認搔癢、雙眼或單眼、流淚、過敏鼻炎、暴露史，並檢查疼痛、畏光、視力下降、隱形眼鏡或角膜風險。 / Clarify itching, bilateral versus unilateral symptoms, tearing, allergic rhinitis, exposure history, and check pain, photophobia, vision loss, contact lens use, or corneal risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 抽搐、發作後混亂、創傷、發燒或代謝風險時，要先確認是否為首次癲癇發作或急性誘發性發作。
conditions.summary_en: Seizure activity, postictal confusion, trauma, fever, or metabolic risk should trigger first-seizure and acute symptomatic seizure review.
ask_next: 先確認發作時間、持續多久、是否仍反覆發作、外傷、發燒、低血糖/低鈉、用藥或毒物暴露，並評估是否需要急診、影像、實驗室與 EEG。

conditions.name_zh: 貝爾氏麻痺或周邊性顏面神經麻痺
conditions.name_en: Bell palsy or peripheral facial nerve palsy
conditions.summary_zh: 單側臉部上下半部無力可考慮周邊性顏面神經麻痺，但必須先排除中風、帶狀皰疹、萊姆病或其他可治療原因。
conditions.summary_en: Unilateral upper and lower facial weakness can fit peripheral facial nerve palsy while stroke and treatable causes remain active exclusions.
ask_next: 釐清是否額頭也無力、起病時間、耳痛或水泡、味覺/流淚變化、肢體無力或語言視覺異常，必要時先走中風排除流程。

conditions.name_zh: 心房顫動或其他心律不整
conditions.summary_zh: 心悸、心跳不規則、喘、昏厥或運動時昏厥時，需要納入心房顫動、心房撲動與其他心律不整。
conditions.summary_en: Palpitations, irregular rhythm sensation, dyspnea, syncope, or exertional syncope should include atrial fibrillation, flutter, and other arrhythmias.
ask_next: 確認脈搏是否規則、症狀開始時間、胸痛/喘/昏厥、甲狀腺或藥物刺激因子、既往心臟病，並評估 ECG 與血栓風險資料。

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒合併新雜音、瓣膜/心臟裝置、血管內管路、注射藥物或栓塞/瘀點線索時，要納入感染性心內膜炎。
conditions.summary_en: Fever with new murmur, valve or device history, intravascular access, injection drug use, or embolic/petechial signs should include infective endocarditis.
ask_next: 釐清發燒時間、心雜音/瓣膜/裝置、血管內管路或注射藥物、栓塞現象，並確認是否需要血液培養與心臟超音波評估。

conditions.summary_zh: 上呼吸道感染後咳嗽、痰、輕微發燒或喘鳴，且沒有肺炎/氣喘/COPD 惡化紅旗時，可納入急性支氣管炎。
conditions.summary_en: Cough with or without sputum after an upper respiratory illness can fit acute bronchitis when pneumonia or chronic lung disease exacerbation red flags are absent.
ask_next: 確認咳嗽多久、是否高燒、低血氧、呼吸窘迫、胸痛、咳血、慢性肺病或免疫低下，必要時排除肺炎。

conditions.summary_zh: 兩歲以下嬰幼兒出現咳嗽、喘鳴、發燒、呼吸急促或凹陷時，要納入細支氣管炎與低氧風險。
conditions.summary_en: Infants under 2 years with cough, wheeze, fever, tachypnea, retractions, or distress should include bronchiolitis and hypoxemia risk.
ask_next: 釐清年齡、餵食與尿量、呼吸速率、凹陷、低氧、早產/心肺病風險、是否需要氧氣或補液評估。

conditions.summary_zh: 犬吠樣咳嗽、聲音沙啞或吸氣性喘鳴，特別是幼兒，需納入哮吼，同時確認呼吸窘迫程度。
conditions.summary_en: Barking cough, hoarseness, or inspiratory stridor in a child should include croup while assessing respiratory distress severity.
ask_next: 確認年齡、是否休息時喘鳴、凹陷、流口水、吞嚥困難、毒性外觀或低氧；若不像典型哮吼要排除會厭炎或異物。

conditions.summary_zh: 眼紅合併分泌物、流淚或刺激感可納入急性結膜炎；疼痛、畏光、視力下降與隱形眼鏡需先排除角膜疾病。
conditions.summary_en: Red eye with discharge, tearing, or irritation can fit conjunctivitis; pain, photophobia, vision loss, or contact lens use require corneal review.
ask_next: 釐清單側/雙側、分泌物型態、接觸史、視力、疼痛、畏光、外傷與隱形眼鏡使用。

conditions.name_zh: 角膜擦傷、角膜炎或角膜潰瘍風險
conditions.name_en: Corneal abrasion, keratitis, or corneal ulcer risk
conditions.summary_zh: 眼痛紅、外傷、異物、隱形眼鏡、畏光或視力下降時，需優先納入角膜擦傷/角膜炎/角膜潰瘍。
conditions.summary_en: Painful red eye with trauma, foreign body, contact lens use, photophobia, or vision change should prioritize corneal abrasion, keratitis, or ulcer risk.
ask_next: 確認隱形眼鏡、外傷或異物、疼痛/畏光、視力下降、角膜染色結果與是否需要眼科急評估。

conditions.summary_zh: 牙痛、咀嚼痛、牙齦或臉部腫脹、發燒時，要納入牙源性感染；吞嚥困難、頸部腫脹或呼吸風險需升級。
conditions.summary_en: Dental pain, percussion or chewing pain, gingival/facial swelling, and fever should include dental abscess or odontogenic infection.
ask_next: 釐清牙痛位置、咀嚼或敲擊痛、臉頰/牙齦/頸部腫脹、發燒、張口困難、吞嚥或呼吸風險。

conditions.summary_zh: 左下腹痛、發燒、壓痛或腹膜刺激徵象時，可納入憩室炎與併發膿瘍/穿孔風險。
conditions.summary_en: Left lower quadrant abdominal pain with fever, tenderness, or peritoneal signs should include diverticulitis and complication risk.
ask_next: 確認疼痛位置與時間、發燒、腹膜刺激、免疫低下、既往憩室病、便血或泌尿/婦科替代診斷線索。

conditions.summary_zh: 排便減少、排便困難、腹脹、直腸痛或疑似阻塞時，可納入便祕或糞便嵌塞，並留意腸阻塞紅旗。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced stool frequency, difficult evacuation, distension, rectal pain, or suspected blockage should include constipation or fecal impaction.
ask_next: 釐清最後排便/排氣、腹脹嘔吐、藥物如 opioids/抗膽鹼、神經症狀、直腸痛與腸阻塞紅旗。

conditions.summary_zh: 排便時劇痛、肛門疼痛或鮮血便，可納入肛裂或痔瘡；大量出血、感染或癌症警訊需另評估。
conditions.summary_en: Pain with defecation, anorectal pain, or bright red bleeding can fit anal fissure or hemorrhoids while major bleeding or infection red flags are checked.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否與排便相關、出血量、硬便或用力、肛周腫塊、發燒膿瘍、體重下降或大腸癌風險。

conditions.summary_zh: 黃疸、疲倦、噁心嘔吐、發燒或右上腹痛時，可納入急性病毒性肝炎；意識改變或凝血問題需急症評估。
conditions.summary_en: Jaundice with fatigue, nausea/vomiting, fever, or right upper quadrant pain should include acute viral hepatitis while liver failure signs are checked.
ask_next: 釐清黃疸時間、尿色/糞色、旅行或食物暴露、性/血液暴露、用藥毒物、右上腹痛與肝衰竭警訊。

conditions.summary_zh: 意識改變、抽搐風險、嘔吐、利尿劑或水分失衡時，要納入低血鈉與嚴重神經症狀風險。
conditions.summary_en: Altered mental status, seizure risk, vomiting, diuretic exposure, or water balance problems should include hyponatremia.
ask_next: 確認鈉值、症狀嚴重度與時間、利尿劑/SSRI/抗癲癇藥、嘔吐腹瀉、心肝腎病、水攝取與抽搐/昏迷風險。

conditions.summary_zh: 腎功能異常、相關用藥、無力、心悸、昏厥或 ECG 風險時，要納入高血鉀。
conditions.summary_en: Kidney disease, potassium-raising medications, weakness, palpitations, syncope, or ECG risk should include hyperkalemia.
ask_next: 確認鉀值、腎功能、ACEi/ARB/螺內酯/補鉀、肌無力、心悸、昏厥與 ECG 變化。

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒後或伴隨上呼吸道症狀的瀰漫性皮疹可納入病毒疹；需排除紫斑、黏膜病灶、毒性外觀與懷孕暴露風險。
conditions.summary_en: Diffuse rash with fever or viral prodrome can fit viral exanthem while purpura, mucosal lesions, toxicity, and pregnancy exposure risks are checked.
ask_next: 釐清發燒與皮疹先後、疫苗史、接觸史、黏膜/紫斑/水泡、懷孕暴露與是否需通報或隔離。

conditions.summary_zh: 夜間劇癢、指縫/手腕/腰部等皮疹、隧道樣病灶或家戶接觸者同時搔癢時，應納入疥瘡。
conditions.summary_en: Nocturnal pruritus, papular rash in typical sites, burrows, or household contacts with itching should include scabies.
ask_next: 確認夜間搔癢、病灶位置、隧道樣皮疹、同住者症狀、機構暴露、免疫低下或痂皮型疥瘡風險。

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性反覆搔癢、屈側濕疹樣皮疹、乾燥或過敏體質脈絡時，可納入異位性皮膚炎。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic relapsing pruritus with flexural or eczematous rash, xerosis, or atopic history should include atopic dermatitis.
ask_next: 釐清慢性/反覆性、分布、搔癢程度、過敏鼻炎/氣喘、感染滲液、接觸性皮膚炎與免疫低下風險。

conditions.summary_zh: 邊界清楚的紅色鱗屑斑塊、頭皮/伸側分布、指甲變化或關節症狀時，可納入乾癬與乾癬性關節炎風險。
conditions.summary_en: Well-demarcated scaly plaques, scalp/extensor involvement, nail changes, or joint symptoms should include psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis risk.
ask_next: 確認斑塊分布、頭皮/指甲、關節疼痛腫脹、感染或藥物誘發、全身型或膿皰型紅旗。

conditions.summary_zh: 疼痛、群聚水泡或潰瘍、排尿痛、發燒或性接觸史時，可納入生殖器皰疹。
conditions.summary_en: Painful grouped vesicles or ulcers, dysuria, fever, or sexual exposure history should include genital herpes.
ask_next: 釐清病灶型態、第一次或復發、排尿痛、懷孕狀態、免疫低下、性伴侶暴露與其他性病檢測需求。

conditions.name_zh: 尿道炎或性傳染感染相關尿道症狀
conditions.summary_zh: 尿道分泌物、排尿痛或性接觸風險時，要納入尿道炎、淋病、披衣菌與其他 STI。
conditions.summary_en: Urethral discharge, dysuria, or sexual exposure risk should include urethritis, gonorrhea, chlamydia, and other STI causes.
ask_next: 確認分泌物、排尿痛、性伴侶與暴露時間、睪丸/骨盆疼痛、懷孕可能與需要 NAAT/性病篩檢。

conditions.summary_zh: 單側陰囊疼痛或腫脹合併尿道/泌尿症狀時，可納入副睪炎，但急性睪丸扭轉必須先排除。
conditions.summary_en: Unilateral scrotal pain or swelling with urinary or STI symptoms should include epididymitis while testicular torsion is excluded.
ask_next: 釐清疼痛起始速度、睪丸位置、噁心嘔吐、發燒、尿道分泌物、性接觸風險，急性劇痛需先排除扭轉。

conditions.name_zh: 先兆流產或早期妊娠流失
conditions.name_en: Threatened miscarriage or early pregnancy loss
conditions.summary_zh: 懷孕早期陰道出血、骨盆痛或腹痛時，要納入先兆流產/早期妊娠流失，同時排除子宮外孕與不穩定。
conditions.summary_en: First-trimester bleeding with pelvic or abdominal pain should include threatened miscarriage or early pregnancy loss while ectopic pregnancy and instability are excluded.
ask_next: 確認妊娠週數、出血量、腹痛、暈厥/不穩定、Rh 狀態、超音波與 beta-hCG 資訊，並主動排除子宮外孕。

conditions.summary_zh: 妊娠 20 週後出血、腹痛、子宮壓痛、創傷或休克時，要優先納入胎盤早期剝離。
conditions.summary_en: Bleeding after 20 weeks, abdominal or uterine pain, tenderness, trauma, or shock should prioritize placental abruption.
ask_next: 立刻確認妊娠週數、出血量、腹痛/子宮壓痛、胎動、血壓與休克、創傷史，並評估產科急症處置路徑。

conditions.summary_zh: 右上腹痛合併發燒、噁心嘔吐或進食後惡化時，要把急性膽囊炎納入鑑別。
conditions.summary_en: RUQ pain with fever, nausea/vomiting, or postprandial worsening should include acute cholecystitis.
ask_next: 確認右上腹壓痛、Murphy sign、發燒/寒顫、嘔吐、黃疸、疼痛持續時間與超音波或肝膽胰指標資料。 / Check RUQ tenderness, Murphy sign, fever or chills, vomiting, jaundice, duration, and ultrasound or hepatobiliary labs.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、黃疸、右上腹痛，或合併低血壓/意識改變時，需優先考慮急性膽管炎。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, jaundice, RUQ pain, or instability/confusion should prioritize acute cholangitis.
ask_next: 確認 Charcot triad、低血壓或意識改變、膽道阻塞/結石史、肝膽胰指標、血液培養與是否需要急症膽道評估。 / Check Charcot triad, hypotension or confusion, biliary obstruction or stones, liver tests, cultures, and urgent biliary review need.

conditions.name_zh: 困難梭狀芽孢桿菌腸炎
conditions.summary_zh: 腹瀉、腹痛、發燒、血便或近期抗生素/住院脈絡時，需納入 C. difficile 腸炎。
conditions.summary_en: Diarrhea context with abdominal pain, fever, blood, recent antibiotics, or hospitalization should include C. difficile colitis.
ask_next: 確認近期抗生素、住院或長照暴露、腹瀉次數、血便、脫水、白血球/腎功能風險與是否有毒性巨結腸或敗血症警訊。 / Clarify recent antibiotics or facility exposure, stool frequency, blood, dehydration, WBC/renal risk, and toxic megacolon or sepsis clues.

conditions.name_zh: 發炎性腸道疾病急性惡化
conditions.summary_zh: 反覆腹痛、血便、體重下降、疲倦或既往 IBD 脈絡，需納入 Crohn/潰瘍性結腸炎惡化。
conditions.summary_en: Recurrent abdominal pain, bloody diarrhea, weight loss, fatigue, or known IBD should include Crohn or ulcerative colitis flare.
ask_next: 確認既往 IBD、腹瀉/血便天數、體重變化、發燒、關節/眼/皮膚腸外表現、感染風險與是否有急腹症或脫水。 / Check IBD history, diarrhea or bleeding duration, weight, fever, extraintestinal features, infection risk, and acute abdomen or dehydration.

conditions.summary_zh: 左下腹痛合併血便，尤其低灌流、血管疾病或高齡脈絡時，要納入缺血性結腸炎。
conditions.summary_en: LLQ pain with rectal bleeding, especially with low-flow or vascular risk, should include ischemic colitis.
ask_next: 確認疼痛位置、血便時間、低血壓/脫水/血管疾病、抗凝血藥、腹膜刺激與是否需要影像或內視鏡評估。 / Clarify pain location, bleeding timing, hypotension/dehydration/vascular disease, anticoagulants, peritoneal signs, and imaging or endoscopy need.

conditions.summary_zh: 突發視野缺損、飛蚊/閃光、外傷後視力變化時，要納入視網膜剝離。
conditions.summary_en: Sudden visual field loss, flashes/floaters, or post-trauma vision change should include retinal detachment.
ask_next: 確認是否突發飛蚊、閃光、幕簾感、視野缺損、外傷或眼科手術史，並標記需要眼科急症評估的情境。 / Ask about sudden floaters, flashes, curtain, field loss, trauma or eye surgery, and urgent ophthalmology review context.

conditions.summary_zh: 眼球轉動痛合併視力下降、色覺改變或神經症狀時，需納入視神經炎。
conditions.summary_en: Pain with eye movement plus vision loss, color change, or neurologic symptoms should include optic neuritis.
synonyms: pain with eye movement vision loss
ask_next: 確認視力下降速度、單眼或雙眼、色覺、眼球轉動痛、既往脫髓鞘症狀與是否需要神經/眼科評估。 / Clarify visual loss tempo, unilateral/bilateral symptoms, color vision, pain with movement, demyelinating history, and neuro-ophthalmology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 眼痛、紅眼、畏光、飛蚊或視力下降時，需納入葡萄膜炎並排除感染/外傷脈絡。
conditions.summary_en: Eye pain/redness with photophobia, floaters, or decreased vision should include uveitis.
ask_next: 確認畏光、視力下降、飛蚊、外傷、隱形眼鏡、免疫/關節/皮膚病史與是否需要裂隙燈或眼科評估。 / Check photophobia, vision loss, floaters, trauma, contact lens use, immune/joint/skin history, and slit-lamp or ophthalmology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 耳痛合併發燒、耳後紅腫壓痛或急性中耳炎後惡化時，要納入乳突炎。
conditions.summary_en: Ear pain with fever, postauricular swelling/tenderness, or worsening after otitis media should include mastoiditis.
ask_next: 確認耳後紅腫壓痛、耳廓外推、近期中耳炎、耳漏、發燒、頭痛或顱內併發警訊。 / Check postauricular tenderness/swelling, pinna displacement, recent otitis media, drainage, fever, headache, and intracranial complication clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 皮疹、疲倦、發燒、臉麻痺或神經症狀脈絡下，需納入萊姆病。
conditions.summary_en: Rash, fatigue, fever, facial palsy, or neurologic symptoms should include Lyme disease when exposure context fits.
ask_next: 確認蜱暴露或流行區、擴大性皮疹、發燒疲倦、臉麻痺、神經痛、頸僵硬與是否需檢驗/感染科評估。 / Clarify tick exposure or endemic area, expanding rash, fever/fatigue, facial palsy, radicular pain, meningitis signs, and testing or ID review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 新發不明皮疹、水疱/膿疱、發燒或淋巴結腫大脈絡時，需納入 mpox。
conditions.summary_en: New unexplained rash or vesiculopustular lesions with fever or lymphadenopathy context should include mpox.
ask_next: 確認皮疹型態與分布、發燒/淋巴結、暴露與接觸史、性健康脈絡、免疫低下與是否需感染管制/檢驗。 / Check lesion morphology/distribution, fever or nodes, exposures, sexual health context, immunocompromise, and infection-control/testing need.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒合併咳嗽、流鼻水、紅眼與向下擴散皮疹時，要納入麻疹與感染管制。
conditions.summary_en: Fever with cough, coryza, conjunctivitis, and spreading maculopapular rash should include measles and infection control needs.
ask_next: 確認疫苗狀態、暴露/旅遊、發燒高度、咳嗽鼻炎結膜炎、Koplik spots、皮疹進展與隔離通報需求。 / Check vaccination, exposure/travel, fever, cough/coryza/conjunctivitis, Koplik spots, rash progression, and isolation/reporting need.

conditions.summary_zh: 鼻塞、咳嗽、發燒、喘鳴或嬰幼兒/高風險成人呼吸症狀時，需納入 RSV。
conditions.summary_en: Congestion, cough, fever, wheeze, or respiratory symptoms in infants or high-risk adults should include RSV.
ask_next: 確認年齡、高風險共病、餵食/脫水、血氧、呼吸窘迫、喘鳴、接觸史與是否需檢測或急症評估。 / Check age, high-risk comorbidity, feeding/dehydration, oxygenation, distress, wheeze, exposure, and testing or urgent review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 長期飲酒後停喝或減量，合併焦躁、心搏過速、幻覺、抽搐或譫妄時，需納入酒精戒斷。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced or stopped heavy alcohol use with agitation, tachycardia, hallucinations, seizures, or delirium should include alcohol withdrawal.
ask_next: 確認最後飲酒時間、每日量、既往戒斷/癲癇/譫妄、生命徵象、意識、共用鎮靜物質與是否需急症監測。 / Clarify last drink, usual amount, prior withdrawal/seizure/DT, vitals, mental status, co-sedatives, and monitored emergency care need.

conditions.name_zh: 鴉片類藥物中毒或過量
conditions.summary_zh: 物質使用脈絡合併呼吸抑制、意識改變、低血壓或昏厥時，要優先考慮鴉片類過量。
conditions.summary_en: Substance-use context with respiratory depression, altered mental status, hypotension, or syncope should prioritize opioid overdose.
ask_next: 立即確認呼吸頻率/深度、血氧、意識、瞳孔、共同攝入物、現場藥物線索與是否需急救處置。 / Immediately check respiratory rate/depth, oxygenation, mental status, pupils, co-ingestions, scene medication clues, and emergency response need.

conditions.summary_zh: 物質使用脈絡合併心搏過速、胸痛、焦躁、幻覺、抽搐或高熱時，要納入興奮劑中毒。
conditions.summary_en: Substance-use context with tachycardia, chest pain, agitation, psychosis, seizure, or hyperthermia should include stimulant toxicity.
ask_next: 確認使用物質、時間與途徑，評估胸痛/ECG、體溫、血壓、抽搐、精神病性症狀與橫紋肌溶解/腎風險。 / Clarify substance, timing and route; assess chest pain/ECG, temperature, BP, seizures, psychosis, and rhabdomyolysis or renal risk.

conditions.summary_zh: 疑似阿斯匹靈/水楊酸攝入合併嘔吐、呼吸異常、耳鳴、意識改變或抽搐時，要納入水楊酸鹽中毒。
conditions.summary_en: Possible aspirin/salicylate exposure with vomiting, abnormal ventilation, tinnitus, confusion, or seizures should include salicylate toxicity.
ask_next: 確認攝入品項/劑量/時間、耳鳴、呼吸型態、酸鹼與電解質資料、腎功能、意識/抽搐與毒物中心諮詢需求。 / Clarify product, dose, timing, tinnitus, ventilation pattern, acid-base/electrolytes, renal function, mental status/seizure, and poison-center consultation need.

conditions.name_zh: 鐮刀型貧血急性胸症候群
conditions.summary_zh: 已知或疑似鐮刀型疾病合併胸痛、發燒、咳嗽、呼吸困難或低氧時，要優先排除急性胸症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Known or possible sickle cell disease with chest pain, fever, cough, dyspnea, or hypoxemia should prioritize acute chest syndrome.
ask_next: 確認鐮刀型疾病史、胸痛/咳嗽/發燒、血氧、呼吸窘迫、疼痛危象、近期感染與是否需要影像/血液科急症評估。 / Check sickle cell history, chest pain/cough/fever, oxygenation, distress, pain crisis, infection, and imaging or hematology emergency review need.

conditions.name_zh: 鐮刀型貧血血管阻塞疼痛危象
conditions.summary_zh: 已知或疑似鐮刀型疾病合併嚴重骨/背/胸/肢體疼痛、疲倦或呼吸症狀時，要納入疼痛危象並排除急性胸症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Known or possible sickle cell disease with severe bone/back/chest/limb pain should include vaso-occlusive crisis while acute chest syndrome is checked.
ask_next: 確認鐮刀型疾病史、疼痛位置與基準差異、發燒、胸痛/低氧、脫水、神經症狀與是否有急性胸症候群或感染線索。 / Clarify sickle history, pain location and baseline difference, fever, chest pain/hypoxia, dehydration, neurologic symptoms, and acute chest or infection clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 容易瘀青、黏膜出血、月經量多或疲倦時，要納入血小板低下與 ITP。
conditions.summary_en: Easy bruising, mucosal bleeding, heavy menses, or fatigue should include thrombocytopenia and ITP.
ask_next: 確認出血部位、瘀斑/紫斑/點狀出血、月經量、感染或藥物脈絡、神經症狀與 CBC/血小板資料。 / Check bleeding sites, bruising/purpura/petechiae, menses, infection or medication context, neurologic symptoms, and CBC/platelets.

conditions.summary_zh: 骨痛/背痛、疲倦、貧血線索、腎功能異常或反覆感染時，要納入多發性骨髓瘤。
conditions.summary_en: Bone/back pain, fatigue/anemia clues, renal dysfunction, hypercalcemia context, or recurrent infections should include multiple myeloma.
ask_next: 確認骨痛位置、病理性骨折、疲倦/貧血、腎功能、鈣值、反覆感染、體重下降與是否需血液腫瘤評估。 / Check bone pain, pathologic fracture, fatigue/anemia, renal function, calcium, recurrent infections, weight loss, and hematology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 多關節疼痛腫脹、疲倦、低度發燒或慢性對稱關節症狀時，要納入類風濕性關節炎。
conditions.summary_en: Polyarticular pain/swelling, fatigue, low fever, or chronic symmetric joint symptoms should include rheumatoid arthritis.
ask_next: 確認晨僵時間、對稱小關節、腫脹熱痛、疲倦/體重、眼口乾或肺皮膚症狀，以及是否需風濕免疫評估。 / Clarify morning stiffness, symmetric small joints, swelling/warmth, fatigue/weight, sicca/lung/skin symptoms, and rheumatology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 50 歲以上出現近端肌肉疼痛僵硬、疲倦、低燒或合併巨細胞動脈炎警訊時，要納入 PMR。
conditions.summary_en: Age over 50 with proximal pain/stiffness, fatigue, low fever, or giant-cell arteritis clues should include polymyalgia rheumatica.
ask_next: 確認肩/髖帶僵硬、晨僵、年齡、發燒疲倦、頭痛/顎跛行/視覺症狀與 ESR/CRP 或風濕評估需求。 / Check shoulder/hip stiffness, morning stiffness, age, fever/fatigue, headache/jaw claudication/vision symptoms, and ESR/CRP or rheumatology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 局部骨痛、發燒、疲倦、皮膚感染或近期外傷/手術脈絡時，要納入骨髓炎。
conditions.summary_en: Focal bone pain with fever, fatigue, skin infection, trauma, or surgery context should include osteomyelitis.
ask_next: 確認疼痛位置、發燒、皮膚破口或潰瘍、外傷/手術/注射史、糖尿病或免疫低下、神經缺損與影像/培養需求。 / Check pain location, fever, wound/ulcer, trauma/surgery/injection history, diabetes or immunocompromise, neurologic deficit, and imaging/culture need.

conditions.summary_zh: 進行性雙側肢體無力、反射下降、感覺異常或呼吸/吞嚥風險時，要優先納入 GBS。
conditions.summary_en: Progressive bilateral weakness, sensory symptoms, or respiratory/swallowing risk should prioritize Guillain-Barre syndrome.
ask_next: 確認無力是否對稱且進展、反射、感覺異常、臉/吞嚥/呼吸症狀、自律神經不穩與近期感染或疫苗脈絡。 / Clarify symmetric progression, reflexes, paresthesias, facial/swallowing/respiratory symptoms, autonomic instability, and recent infection or vaccine context.

conditions.summary_zh: 胸痛、呼吸困難、心搏過速、昏厥或血流不穩時，需納入心包填塞與阻塞性休克脈絡。
conditions.summary_en: Chest pain, dyspnea, tachycardia, syncope, or hemodynamic instability should include tamponade as an obstructive shock consideration.
ask_next: 確認低血壓、頸靜脈怒張、心音變小、奇脈、心包疾病/外傷/癌症史、床邊超音波與急症心臟評估需求。 / Check hypotension, JVD, muffled heart sounds, pulsus paradoxus, pericardial disease/trauma/cancer context, bedside echo, and emergency cardiology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重呼吸窘迫、低氧、敗血症/肺炎/外傷/胰臟炎脈絡時，需納入 ARDS。
conditions.summary_en: Severe respiratory distress or hypoxemia after sepsis, pneumonia, trauma, pancreatitis, or aspiration should include ARDS.
ask_next: 確認血氧、呼吸作功、近期敗血症/肺炎/吸入/創傷/胰臟炎、影像雙側浸潤、容量狀態與是否需加護/呼吸器評估。 / Check oxygenation, work of breathing, recent sepsis/pneumonia/aspiration/trauma/pancreatitis, bilateral imaging findings, volume status, and ICU or ventilatory review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 漸進性呼吸困難、胸痛、暈厥、下肢水腫或右心衰脈絡時，需納入肺高壓。
conditions.summary_en: Progressive dyspnea, chest pain, syncope, edema, or right-heart strain context should include pulmonary hypertension.
ask_next: 確認活動耐受、暈厥、胸痛、水腫、低氧、血栓/肺病/結締組織病史與心臟超音波或肺高壓評估需求。 / Clarify exertional tolerance, syncope, chest pain, edema, hypoxemia, thromboembolic/lung/connective-tissue history, and echo or pulmonary hypertension review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 咳嗽、呼吸困難、疲倦、皮疹、眼症狀或多系統症狀時，可納入類肉瘤病。
conditions.summary_en: Cough, dyspnea, fatigue, rash, eye symptoms, or multisystem findings can fit sarcoidosis.
ask_next: 確認肺部症狀、皮膚/眼睛/關節表現、鈣或腎風險、心律或神經症狀、胸部影像與是否需肺科/風濕評估。 / Check pulmonary, skin, eye, joint features, calcium or renal risk, rhythm or neurologic symptoms, chest imaging, and pulmonary/rheumatology review need.

conditions.name_zh: 阻塞型睡眠呼吸中止症
conditions.summary_zh: 白天嗜睡、疲倦、心血管共病或夜間呼吸中止脈絡時，需納入睡眠呼吸中止症。
conditions.summary_en: Daytime sleepiness/fatigue, cardiometabolic comorbidity, or witnessed apneas should include obstructive sleep apnea.
ask_next: 確認打鼾、目擊呼吸中止、白天嗜睡、晨間頭痛、BMI/頸圍、高血壓/心房顫動與睡眠檢查需求。 / Check snoring, witnessed apneas, daytime sleepiness, morning headache, BMI/neck size, hypertension/atrial fibrillation, and sleep-study need.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性進行性呼吸困難、乾咳、疲倦或低氧脈絡時，需納入肺纖維化/間質性肺病。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic progressive dyspnea, dry cough, fatigue, or hypoxemia should include pulmonary fibrosis/interstitial lung disease.
ask_next: 確認症狀時程、乾咳、活動低氧、爆裂音、職業/藥物/結締組織暴露、胸部影像與肺功能或肺科評估需求。 / Clarify timeline, dry cough, exertional desaturation, crackles, occupational/drug/connective-tissue exposure, imaging, and PFT or pulmonary review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 尿量下降、水腫、高血壓、皮疹、關節痛或感染後脈絡時，需納入腎絲球腎炎。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced urine output, edema, hypertension, rash, joint symptoms, or postinfectious context should include glomerulonephritis.
ask_next: 確認血尿/泡泡尿、尿量、血壓、水腫、近期感染、皮疹/關節/肺出血、腎功能與尿檢或腎臟科需求。 / Check hematuria/foamy urine, urine output, BP, edema, recent infection, rash/joint/pulmonary hemorrhage clues, renal function, urinalysis, and nephrology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 全身或下肢水腫、泡泡尿、疲倦、血栓或腎功能風險時，需納入腎病症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Edema, foamy urine context, fatigue, thrombosis risk, or renal dysfunction should include nephrotic syndrome.
ask_next: 確認水腫分布、泡泡尿/蛋白尿、體重變化、血栓症狀、糖尿病/狼瘡/藥物、腎功能與尿蛋白評估需求。 / Check edema distribution, foamy urine/proteinuria, weight change, thrombotic symptoms, diabetes/lupus/drugs, renal function, and urine protein workup need.

conditions.summary_zh: 發燒、排尿疼痛、骨盆或會陰痛、尿滯留或敗血症脈絡時，需納入急性前列腺炎。
conditions.summary_en: Fever, dysuria, pelvic/perineal pain, urinary retention, or sepsis context should include acute prostatitis.
ask_next: 確認發燒寒顫、排尿困難/尿滯留、會陰或骨盆痛、男性泌尿史、敗血症表現與是否需急症泌尿評估。 / Check fever/chills, dysuria/retention, perineal or pelvic pain, male urologic history, sepsis features, and urgent urology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 排尿困難、尿滯留或下泌尿道症狀時，需納入良性前列腺增生。
conditions.summary_en: Voiding difficulty, urinary retention, or lower urinary tract symptoms should include BPH.
ask_next: 確認尿流變細、頻尿/夜尿、急性尿滯留、血尿、感染、腎功能風險與藥物或泌尿科評估需求。 / Check weak stream, frequency/nocturia, acute retention, hematuria, infection, renal risk, medication context, and urology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性或週期性骨盆痛、經痛、不孕或腸泌尿症狀與月經相關時，需納入子宮內膜異位症。
conditions.summary_en: Cyclic or chronic pelvic pain, dysmenorrhea, infertility, or bowel/urinary symptoms linked to menses should include endometriosis.
ask_next: 確認疼痛是否週期性、經痛/性交痛、排便或排尿痛、不孕史、急性腹痛警訊與婦科評估需求。 / Clarify cyclic pattern, dysmenorrhea/dyspareunia, bowel or urinary pain, infertility history, acute abdomen red flags, and gynecology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 月經不規則、體重/代謝脈絡、不孕或高雄性素表現時，需納入 PCOS。
conditions.summary_en: Irregular menses, weight/metabolic context, infertility, or hyperandrogenic features should include PCOS.
ask_next: 確認月經週期、痤瘡/多毛、體重與代謝風險、妊娠可能、不孕需求，以及是否需排除甲狀腺/泌乳素/腎上腺原因。 / Check cycle pattern, acne/hirsutism, weight and metabolic risk, pregnancy possibility, fertility concerns, and thyroid/prolactin/adrenal exclusion need.

conditions.summary_zh: 週期性下腹或骨盆痛且無急性警訊時，可納入原發性經痛並同時排除次發原因。
conditions.summary_en: Cyclic lower abdominal or pelvic pain without acute red flags can fit primary dysmenorrhea while secondary causes are excluded.
ask_next: 確認疼痛與月經關係、初經後時間、出血量、發燒/分泌物/妊娠可能、突然惡化與子宮內膜異位或 PID 線索。 / Check timing with menses, onset after menarche, bleeding volume, fever/discharge/pregnancy possibility, sudden worsening, and endometriosis or PID clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 陰道分泌物、氣味改變或陰道症狀時，需納入細菌性陰道炎並排除 PID/STI/妊娠風險。
conditions.summary_en: Vaginal discharge or odor change should include bacterial vaginosis while PID, STI, and pregnancy risk are assessed.
ask_next: 確認分泌物顏色/氣味、搔癢或疼痛、骨盆痛/發燒、懷孕、性健康風險與是否需檢測 STI 或 PID。 / Check discharge color/odor, itching or pain, pelvic pain/fever, pregnancy, sexual health risk, and STI or PID testing need.

conditions.summary_zh: 陰道分泌物合併搔癢、刺激或外陰疼痛時，需納入念珠菌感染並排除其他感染。
conditions.summary_en: Vaginal discharge with itching, irritation, or vulvar pain should include vulvovaginal candidiasis.
ask_next: 確認搔癢/灼熱、分泌物型態、排尿痛、復發、糖尿病或免疫低下、懷孕與是否需濕片/檢測。 / Check itching/burning, discharge pattern, dysuria, recurrence, diabetes or immunocompromise, pregnancy, and wet mount/testing need.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、皮疹、關節痛、腎臟或神經血液表現時，需納入全身性紅斑狼瘡。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, rash, joint symptoms, renal, neurologic, or hematologic features should include SLE.
ask_next: 確認光敏/口腔潰瘍/皮疹、關節炎、血球低下、腎尿異常、胸膜心包痛、神經症狀與風濕/腎臟評估需求。 / Check photosensitivity/oral ulcers/rash, arthritis, cytopenias, renal urine findings, pleuritic/pericardial pain, neurologic symptoms, and rheumatology/nephrology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 血栓、單側腿腫、神經缺損、妊娠併發或狼瘡脈絡時，需納入抗磷脂症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Thrombosis, unilateral leg swelling, neurologic deficits, pregnancy morbidity, or lupus context should include antiphospholipid syndrome.
ask_next: 確認動靜脈血栓史、反覆流產/妊娠併發、狼瘡症狀、抗凝血用藥、血小板與血液/風濕評估需求。 / Check arterial/venous thrombosis history, pregnancy morbidity, lupus features, anticoagulants, platelets, and hematology/rheumatology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性下背痛、晨僵、活動後改善、眼炎或腸病/皮膚脈絡時，需納入僵直性脊椎炎。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic inflammatory back pain, morning stiffness, improvement with activity, uveitis, or IBD/skin context should include ankylosing spondylitis.
ask_next: 確認年齡、晨僵、活動後改善、夜間痛、臀部交替痛、葡萄膜炎/IBD/乾癬與風濕評估需求。 / Check age, morning stiffness, improvement with movement, night pain, alternating buttock pain, uveitis/IBD/psoriasis, and rheumatology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性關節痛/腫脹合併近期腸胃或泌尿生殖感染、尿道分泌物或眼症狀時，需納入反應性關節炎。
conditions.summary_en: Arthritis after GI or genitourinary infection, urethral discharge, dysuria, or eye symptoms should include reactive arthritis.
ask_next: 確認近期腹瀉或性健康/泌尿感染、關節分布、眼痛紅、皮膚黏膜病灶、發燒與感染/風濕評估需求。 / Check recent diarrhea or sexual/urologic infection, joint pattern, eye pain/redness, skin/mucosal lesions, fever, and ID/rheumatology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性廣泛疼痛、疲倦、睡眠或認知症狀時，可納入纖維肌痛症，但需排除發炎/內分泌/危險警訊。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic widespread pain with fatigue, sleep, or cognitive symptoms can fit fibromyalgia after inflammatory/endocrine red flags are excluded.
ask_next: 確認疼痛分布與時程、睡眠、疲倦/認知症狀、情緒、藥物、甲狀腺/發炎/神經警訊與功能影響。 / Clarify pain distribution/timeline, sleep, fatigue/cognitive symptoms, mood, medications, thyroid/inflammatory/neurologic red flags, and function impact.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性關節痛、活動後惡化、短暫晨僵或功能受限時，需納入退化性關節炎。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic joint pain worsened by activity, brief stiffness, or functional limitation should include osteoarthritis.
ask_next: 確認關節位置、活動/休息關係、晨僵時間、腫熱紅、創傷、發燒或發炎性關節炎警訊與影像需求。 / Check joint location, activity/rest pattern, stiffness duration, warmth/redness, trauma, fever or inflammatory arthritis red flags, and imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 嚴重單側眼眶/顳部頭痛、流淚鼻塞、躁動或週期性發作時，需納入叢發性頭痛。
conditions.summary_en: Severe unilateral orbital/temporal headache with autonomic symptoms, agitation, or clustered attacks should include cluster headache.
ask_next: 確認單側眼眶/顳部位置、每次持續時間、流淚鼻塞、眼瞼下垂、躁動、發作群聚與雷擊/神經缺損紅旗。 / Check unilateral orbital/temporal location, attack duration, tearing/congestion, ptosis, restlessness, clustering, and thunderclap or neurologic red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 反覆眩暈合併波動性聽力下降、耳鳴或耳悶時，需納入梅尼爾氏症。
conditions.summary_en: Recurrent vertigo with fluctuating hearing loss, tinnitus, or aural fullness should include Meniere disease.
ask_next: 確認眩暈發作時間、聽力是否波動、耳鳴/耳悶、神經缺損、偏頭痛特徵、藥物與耳鼻喉或聽力檢查需求。 / Check vertigo duration, fluctuating hearing, tinnitus/fullness, neurologic deficits, migraine features, medications, and ENT/audiology need.

conditions.summary_zh: 黃疸、腹脹/水腫、腸胃出血、疲倦、意識改變或慢性肝病脈絡時，需納入肝硬化與失代償。
conditions.summary_en: Jaundice, edema/ascites context, GI bleeding, fatigue, altered mental status, or chronic liver disease context should include cirrhosis and decompensation.
ask_next: 確認腹水/水腫、黃疸、腸胃出血、感染、意識變化、酒精/病毒肝炎/代謝風險、凝血與肝膽腸胃評估需求。 / Check ascites/edema, jaundice, GI bleeding, infection, mental status change, alcohol/viral/metabolic risk, coagulation, and hepatology/GI review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 排便次數減少、排便困難、腹脹或直腸症狀且無阻塞/出血/體重減輕等警訊時，可納入功能性便秘。
conditions.summary_en: Reduced stool frequency, difficult evacuation, bloating, or rectal symptoms without obstruction or alarm features can fit functional constipation.
ask_next: 確認排便頻率、糞便型態、排便費力、阻塞感、血便/體重減輕/貧血警訊、用藥、神經症狀與是否需進一步評估。 / Check stool frequency, stool form, straining, outlet symptoms, bleeding/weight loss/anemia alarms, medications, neurologic symptoms, and further workup need.

conditions.summary_zh: 視覺症狀、感覺/運動神經缺損、疲倦或時間上分散的神經事件時，需納入多發性硬化症。
conditions.summary_en: Visual symptoms, sensory or motor deficits, fatigue, or neurologic episodes separated in time should include multiple sclerosis.
ask_next: 確認症狀是否有時間/空間分散、視神經炎、感覺或運動缺損、膀胱症狀、感染或脊髓壓迫紅旗與神經評估需求。 / Check dissemination in time/space, optic neuritis, sensory or motor deficits, bladder symptoms, infection or cord compression red flags, and neurology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 動作變慢、震顫、僵硬、步態改變、跌倒或自主神經/睡眠脈絡時，需納入帕金森氏病。
conditions.summary_en: Bradykinesia, tremor, rigidity, gait change, falls, or autonomic/sleep context should include Parkinson disease.
ask_next: 確認動作變慢、靜止性震顫、僵硬、步態/跌倒、嗅覺/便秘/睡眠行為、藥物誘發與神經評估需求。 / Check bradykinesia, resting tremor, rigidity, gait/falls, smell/constipation/sleep behavior, medication-induced causes, and neurology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 漸進性記憶、語言、執行功能或日常功能下降時，需納入失智症並區分譫妄。
conditions.summary_en: Progressive memory, language, executive, or functional decline should include dementia while delirium is distinguished.
ask_next: 確認時程是否急性或慢性、日常功能、藥物/憂鬱/睡眠、譫妄感染代謝原因、照護安全與認知評估需求。 / Clarify acute vs chronic timeline, daily function, medications/depression/sleep, delirium infection/metabolic causes, safety, and cognitive assessment need.

conditions.summary_zh: 遠端麻木、刺痛、燒灼痛、無力或糖尿病/營養/毒物脈絡時，需納入周邊神經病變。
conditions.summary_en: Distal numbness, tingling, burning pain, weakness, or diabetes/nutritional/toxic context should include peripheral neuropathy.
ask_next: 確認分布、感覺/運動/自律神經症狀、糖尿病、酒精/藥物、B12、腎病、紅旗無力或脊髓壓迫線索。 / Check distribution, sensory/motor/autonomic symptoms, diabetes, alcohol/drugs, B12, kidney disease, and red-flag weakness or cord clues.

conditions.summary_zh: 手部麻木刺痛、夜間惡化、拇指側分布或手功能下降時，需納入腕隧道症候群。
conditions.summary_en: Hand paresthesias, nocturnal symptoms, median nerve distribution, or hand functional decline should include carpal tunnel syndrome.
ask_next: 確認麻木分布、夜間症狀、拇指對掌力、工作/懷孕/糖尿病/甲狀腺脈絡與是否需神經傳導或手外科評估。 / Check numbness distribution, nocturnal symptoms, thumb opposition, work/pregnancy/diabetes/thyroid context, and nerve conduction or hand review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 波動性眼瞼下垂、複視、吞嚥或呼吸肌無力時，需納入重症肌無力。
conditions.summary_en: Fluctuating ptosis, diplopia, bulbar weakness, or respiratory muscle weakness should include myasthenia gravis.
ask_next: 確認眼瞼下垂/複視、咀嚼吞嚥說話、疲勞後惡化、呼吸窘迫、感染或新藥誘發與是否需急症神經評估。 / Check ptosis/diplopia, chewing/swallowing/speech, fatigability, respiratory distress, infection or new-drug trigger, and urgent neurology review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 頭痛、癲癇、神經缺損、妊娠/產後或高凝血脈絡時，需納入腦靜脈竇血栓。
conditions.summary_en: Headache, seizure, neurologic deficits, pregnancy/postpartum, or hypercoagulable context should include cerebral venous sinus thrombosis.
ask_next: 確認頭痛時程、癲癇、局灶缺損、視乳突水腫/視覺症狀、妊娠產後、感染/癌症/血栓史與急症神經影像需求。 / Check headache timeline, seizure, focal deficits, papilledema/visual symptoms, pregnancy/postpartum, infection/cancer/thrombosis history, and urgent neuroimaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性神經缺損、意識改變、嚴重頭痛、嘔吐或高血壓脈絡時，需納入腦內出血。
conditions.summary_en: Acute neurologic deficit, altered mental status, severe headache, vomiting, or hypertension context should include intracerebral hemorrhage.
ask_next: 確認發病時間、血壓、抗凝血藥、外傷、意識與神經缺損進展、嘔吐/癲癇與急症影像需求。 / Check onset time, BP, anticoagulants, trauma, mental status and deficit progression, vomiting/seizure, and urgent imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 急性背痛、骨質疏鬆/癌症/外傷脈絡或身高變矮時，需納入椎體壓迫性骨折。
conditions.summary_en: Acute back pain with osteoporosis, cancer, trauma context, or height loss should include vertebral compression fracture.
ask_next: 確認外傷或輕微動作誘發、骨鬆/癌症/類固醇、疼痛位置、神經缺損、發燒或感染風險與影像需求。 / Check trauma or minor trigger, osteoporosis/cancer/steroids, pain location, neurologic deficit, fever or infection risk, and imaging need.

conditions.summary_zh: 糖尿病或神經病變脈絡下足部潰瘍、膿液、紅腫熱痛、發燒或骨痛時，需納入糖尿病足感染。
conditions.summary_en: Foot ulcer, purulence, cellulitis, fever, or bone pain in diabetes/neuropathy context should include diabetic foot infection.
ask_next: 確認糖尿病/神經病變、潰瘍深度、膿液或惡臭、紅腫範圍、發燒、骨髓炎線索、血流狀態與急症/傷口評估需求。 / Check diabetes/neuropathy, ulcer depth, purulence or odor, erythema extent, fever, osteomyelitis clues, perfusion, and urgent wound review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、水腫、尿量變化、高鉀風險或糖尿病/高血壓脈絡時，需納入慢性腎臟病。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, edema, urine-output change, hyperkalemia risk, or diabetes/hypertension context should include chronic kidney disease.
ask_next: 確認既往 eGFR/肌酸酐、尿蛋白、尿量、水腫、高血壓/糖尿病、藥物、鉀離子風險與腎臟科追蹤需求。 / Check prior eGFR/creatinine, proteinuria, urine output, edema, hypertension/diabetes, medications, potassium risk, and nephrology follow-up need.

conditions.summary_zh: 多尿、口渴、體重變化、疲倦、感染或高/低血糖風險時，需納入糖尿病。
conditions.summary_en: Polyuria, polydipsia, weight change, fatigue, infections, or hyper/hypoglycemia risk should include diabetes mellitus.
ask_next: 確認口渴多尿、體重變化、感染、視力、神經病變、低血糖或 DKA/HHS 警訊與血糖/A1c 評估需求。 / Check thirst/polyuria, weight change, infection, vision, neuropathy, hypoglycemia or DKA/HHS red flags, and glucose/A1c review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 心悸、心搏過速、體重下降、焦躁、出汗或甲狀腺風暴前驅時，需納入甲狀腺亢進。
conditions.summary_en: Palpitations, tachycardia, weight loss, anxiety, sweating, or thyroid storm precursor context should include hyperthyroidism.
ask_next: 確認體重下降、熱不耐、震顫、心悸/心房顫動、眼症狀、甲狀腺藥物或碘暴露與風暴警訊。 / Check weight loss, heat intolerance, tremor, palpitations/AF, eye symptoms, thyroid meds or iodine exposure, and storm red flags.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、貧血脈絡、神經麻木或步態/認知變化時，需納入 B12 缺乏。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, anemia context, neuropathy, gait, or cognitive changes should include vitamin B12 deficiency.
ask_next: 確認飲食/胃腸手術、素食、PPI/metformin、麻木步態、舌炎、貧血資料與 B12/葉酸評估需求。 / Check diet/GI surgery, vegan diet, PPI/metformin, numbness/gait, glossitis, anemia data, and B12/folate evaluation need.

conditions.summary_zh: 疲倦、呼吸困難、暈厥、腸胃出血、經血過多或慢性失血脈絡時，需納入缺鐵性貧血。
conditions.summary_en: Fatigue, dyspnea, syncope, GI bleeding, heavy menses, or chronic blood loss context should include iron deficiency anemia.
ask_next: 確認出血來源、經血量、腸胃症狀、飲食/吸收、懷孕、紅旗體重下降與 CBC/ferritin 或內視鏡評估需求。 / Check bleeding source, menstrual volume, GI symptoms, diet/absorption, pregnancy, weight-loss red flags, and CBC/ferritin or endoscopy review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 慢性腹部症狀、體重下降、疲倦、缺鐵或吸收不良脈絡時，需納入乳糜瀉。
conditions.summary_en: Chronic abdominal symptoms, weight loss, fatigue, iron deficiency, or malabsorption context should include celiac disease.
ask_next: 確認腹瀉/腹脹、體重、缺鐵或骨質風險、家族/自體免疫病史、飲食與血清學/腸胃評估需求。 / Check diarrhea/bloating, weight, iron or bone risk, family/autoimmune history, diet, and serology or GI review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 反覆腹痛與排便型態改變且無出血、體重下降、發燒等警訊時，可納入腸躁症。
conditions.summary_en: Recurrent abdominal pain with altered bowel habits and no alarm bleeding, weight loss, or fever can fit IBS.
synonyms: recurrent abdominal pain bowel habit change
ask_next: 確認疼痛與排便關係、便秘/腹瀉型態、警訊血便/體重減輕/貧血/夜間症狀、感染後時程與腸胃評估需求。 / Check relation to defecation, constipation/diarrhea pattern, alarm bleeding/weight loss/anemia/night symptoms, postinfectious timeline, and GI review need.

conditions.summary_zh: 鼠蹊或陰囊腫塊/痛、腹痛、嘔吐或無法復位時，需納入鼠蹊疝氣與嵌頓風險。
conditions.summary_en: Groin/scrotal bulge or pain, abdominal pain, vomiting, or irreducibility should include inguinal hernia and incarceration risk.
ask_next: 確認腫塊是否可復位、疼痛程度、嘔吐/腹脹/無排氣、皮膚變色、睪丸扭轉排除與外科急症需求。 / Check reducibility, pain severity, vomiting/distension/obstipation, skin color, testicular torsion exclusion, and surgical emergency need.

conditions.summary_zh: 漏尿、急尿、壓力性漏尿或神經/藥物/感染脈絡時，需納入尿失禁。
conditions.summary_en: Urine leakage, urgency, stress leakage, or neurologic/medication/infection context should include urinary incontinence.
ask_next: 確認急迫/壓力/溢流型態、排尿痛、尿滯留、神經缺損、藥物、產後或骨盆病史與泌尿評估需求。 / Check urge/stress/overflow pattern, dysuria, retention, neurologic deficits, medications, postpartum or pelvic history, and urology review need.
